2606.02631.title: Wavelet as Tokenizer: Preliminary Results on a Shared Wavelet Token Schema for Natural Signals
2606.02631.paper_summary: This paper studies whether audio, images, and video can share a common wavelet token schema rather than relying on separate modality-specific latent grids. It introduces a preliminary continuous-token model built around a one-level Haar DWT/IDWT frontend, a shared coefficient-token layout, optional structural metadata, lightweight modality value adapters, and a shared token-wise encoder-decoder trunk. On Speech Commands, EuroSAT RGB, and DAVIS 2017 data, a dense shared model reaches 39.92 dB audio, 29.37 dB image, and 23.93 dB video PSNR. A matched-rate sweep under continuous latent scalar budgets indicates that the visual gains are not explained solely by latent capacity, while also showing that additive metadata embeddings are not a universal source of improvement. Finally, fixed-rate energy selection provides a strong non-parametric baseline: energy_global improves average PSNR over uniform selection by 16.73 dB for audio, 16.90 dB for images, and 15.86 dB for video under compressed keep ratios. Masked sparse training reaches 34.45 dB video PSNR with 50% of dense tokens. The results support a unified wavelet token schema and sparse token interface, while stopping short of establishing a universal discrete vocabulary.
2606.02631.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文研究音頻、圖像和視頻是否可以共享一個共同的小波令牌架構，而不是依賴於單獨的特定於模態的潛在網格。<lb/>它介紹了一個初步的連續令牌模型，該模型圍繞一級Haar DWT/IDWT前端、共享的係數令牌佈局、可選的結構元數據、輕量級的模態值適配器以及共享的令牌編碼-解碼主幹構建。<lb/>在Speech Commands、EuroSAT RGB和DAVIS 2017數據上，一個密集共享模型達到了39.92 dB音頻、29.37 dB圖像和23.93 dB視頻PSNR。<lb/>在連續潛在標量預算下的匹配速率掃描表明，視覺增益並不僅僅是由潛在容量解釋的，同時也顯示附加的元數據嵌入並不是一個普遍的改進來源。<lb/>最後，固定速率能量選擇提供了一個強大的非參數基準：在壓縮保持比下，energy_global使音頻的平均PSNR比均勻選擇提高了16.73 dB，圖像提高了16.90 dB，視頻提高了15.86 dB。<lb/>掩碼稀疏訓練在50%的密集令牌下達到了34.45 dB視頻PSNR。<lb/>這些結果支持一個統一的小波令牌架構和稀疏令牌接口，同時未能建立一個普遍的離散詞彙。
2606.02631.author: Shenghao Ding et.al.
